title: Inbox, Sent, Drafts, and Archive
drDigitalIntro: Keeping your inbox organized makes email much less stressful. Mark junk emails as Spam so your email app learns to filter them. Archive emails you want to keep but don't need in your Inbox — they're stored safely and searchable later. Delete emails you no longer need. Moving emails to the right folders keeps your Inbox clean and easy to manage.

playgroundTask.goal: You organized your inbox like a pro

steps.say: That 'You won $1,000,000!!!' email looks suspicious. Click on it.
This is spam! Mark it as Spam so it goes to the Spam folder.
Open the email from Amazon about your order.
You got your package. Archive this email to keep it but clear your inbox.
Click Spam in the sidebar to see where spam goes.

drDigitalSuccess: Your inbox is organized! Spam goes to Spam, archived emails are stored safely, and your Inbox stays clean.
drDigitalHint: Open an email first, then use the action buttons that appear at the top to mark as spam, archive, or delete.
